name: CineCritics
description: Full-stack CRUD project built with JS, PHP + JWT, and MySQL. CineCritics is an interactive website for movie lovers where you can search for, find, and review your favorite movies from a database. If you change your mind, you can always delete or modify your review. All review interactions require an account.

name: Books Finder
description: A full-stack project that uses VueJS as the frontend framework and PHP with MySQL for the backend. Books Finder helps you find your next read by suggesting a random book and giving you a brief overview of it. It also includes a search functionality that delivers all the information you need about any searched book.

name: To-Do-Son
description: To-Do app written in Python that transcribes all your tasks in JSON format. It uses the JSON library for cleaner and overall better code; the terminal is customized using the art library. The project is provided with a Jenkins + Groovy pipeline to automate the building, testing, and Docker image-building phases of the project.

name: E-Portfolio
description: A personal e-portfolio to share who I am, my interests, my skills, projects I have built over the years, and opinions/tutorials on random tech topics. Built with CSS Modules, TypeScript, ReactJS, and React Router; completely responsive.
